ucs.title: [LLM] Winter Vivern (TA473) Aperetif PowerShell loader chained from gov-themed lure document
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Winter Vivern execution chain: a phishing lure (Word/Excel/HTA) drops or invokes a .bat/.cmd that launches PowerShell with an encoded WebClient/IEX downloader pulling the 'Aperetif' implant. The actor consistently typo-squats European government, NATO, and webmail vendor domains for the staging URL.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*-enc*" OR Processes.process="*-EncodedCommand*" OR (Processes.process="*IEX*" AND Processes.process="*WebClient*") OR (Processes.process="*Invoke-Expression*" AND Processes.process="*DownloadString*") OR (Processes.process="*Invoke-WebRequest*" AND Processes.process="*-OutFile*")) AND Processes.parent_process_name IN ("cmd.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","outlook.exe","explorer.exe") by host Processes.user Processes.process_id Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=process "(?i)(?<b64>[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{120,})" | where isnotnull(b64) OR match(process,"(?i)(mfa-aws|troopspace|polonia24h|ssa-gov|natoinfo|mail-zimbra|cabinet-rad|ukrnews-online)") | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | join type=inner host [| tstats summariesonly=t values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dport from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.app="powershell.exe" AND All_Traffic.dest_port IN (80,443,8080,8443) by All_Traffic.src | rename All_Traffic.src as host]
ucs.kql:
let lureParents = dynamic(["winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","cmd.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let wvDomainHints = dynamic(["mfa-aws","troopspace","polonia24h","ssa-gov","natoinfo","cabinet-rad","ukrnews","mail-zimbra","roundcube-","polishgov","mod-info"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (lureParents)
   or InitiatingProcessParentFileName in~ (lureParents)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("IEX","Invoke-Expression","Invoke-WebRequest","Net.WebClient","DownloadString","DownloadFile","-enc","-EncodedCommand","FromBase64String")
| extend Encoded = extract(@"(?i)[-/](?:e|ec|enc|encodedcommand)\s+([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{100,})", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend Url = extract(@"(?i)(https?://[^\s\"\']+)", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend MatchesWVStaging = iff(Url has_any (wvDomainHints), true, false)
| where isnotempty(Encoded) or isnotempty(Url)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessParentFileName, ProcessCommandLine, Url, MatchesWVStaging
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
    | project DeviceName, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort, NetTime=Timestamp
) on DeviceName
| where MatchesWVStaging == true or isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
| sort by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: Winter Vivern (TA473 / UAC-0114) is documented by CERT-UA, SentinelLabs, and Proofpoint to consistently chain Office/HTA lures into a .bat -> PowerShell -> WebClient/IEX download of the Aperetif/MicrosoftMSDtransfer scripts hosted on typo-squatted government/NATO/webmail domains. The combination of (a) a documented Office/scripthost parent, (b) PowerShell with encoded or download-cradle syntax, an

ucs.title: [LLM] Winter Vivern Roundcube/Zimbra webmail XSS (CVE-2023-5631 / CVE-2022-27926) email exfiltration
ucs.description: Hunts inbound email containing the SVG/HTML payload Winter Vivern uses to trigger client-side XSS in Roundcube and Zimbra (their hallmark targeting of European MFA/MoD webmail), and correlates it to the webmail server process making outbound HTTP to actor C2 to exfiltrate folder listings and message contents. This is the only Russia-aligned crew currently using browser-side webmail XSS at scale.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Email.subject) as subject values(All_Email.src_user) as sender values(All_Email.recipient) as recipient values(All_Email.file_name) as attach values(All_Email.message_id) as msg_id from datamodel=Email.All_Email where (All_Email.file_name="*.svg" OR All_Email.file_name="*.eml" OR All_Email.file_name="*.html") by All_Email.src_user All_Email.recipient | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Email)` | search subject IN ("*MFA*","*Ministry*","*NATO*","*Ukraine*","*Polish*","*UN *","*urgent*","*meeting*") | append [| tstats summariesonly=t count values(Web.url) as url values(Web.user_agent) as ua values(Web.dest) as dest from datamodel=Web.Web where Web.src_category="webmail_server" OR Web.app IN ("httpd","nginx","php-fpm","roundcube","zimbra") by Web.src Web.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Web)` | regex url="(?i)(\.php\?action=|/api/v1/upload|/exfil|recoverpassword|attach\.php\?id=)" | search NOT dest IN ("$internal_subnets$")] | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(*) as * by recipient
ucs.kql:
let svgPayload = EmailAttachmentInfo
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where FileType in~ ("svg","html","htm","xml","eml")
| join kind=inner (
    EmailEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where DeliveryAction == "Delivered"
) on NetworkMessageId
| where Subject has_any ("MFA","Ministry","NATO","Ukraine","Polish","Cabinet","urgent","meeting","agenda")
| project Timestamp, NetworkMessageId, SenderFromAddress, SenderMailFromDomain, RecipientEmailAddress, Subject, FileName, FileType, SHA256;
let webmailEgress = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("httpd","httpd.exe","nginx","nginx.exe","php-cgi.exe","w3wp.exe","java.exe","node.exe")
   or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ("roundcube","zimbra","mailbox")
| where RemoteUrl matches regex @"(?i)(recoverpassword|attach\.php\?id=|/exfil|action=upload|cgi-bin/.*\.sh)"
   or RemoteUrl has_any ("mfa-aws","troopspace","polonia24h","natoinfo","cabinet-rad");
svgPayload
| join kind=leftouter (webmailEgress | summarize EgressUrls=make_set(RemoteUrl), EgressIPs=make_set(RemoteIP) by DeviceName) on $left.RecipientEmailAddress == $right.DeviceName
| extend Severity = iff(array_length(EgressUrls) > 0, "High", "Hunt")
| project Timestamp, RecipientEmailAddress, SenderFromAddress, SenderMailFromDomain, Subject, FileName, FileType, SHA256, EgressUrls, EgressIPs, Severity
| sort by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: Winter Vivern is uniquely associated (per ESET's October 2023 report and Proofpoint's TA473 reporting) with weaponizing CVE-2023-5631 in Roundcube and CVE-2022-27926 in Zimbra by emailing a crafted SVG/HTML body whose JavaScript runs in the victim analyst's webmail session and posts folder lists and message bodies back to actor infrastructure. Pivoting from inbound SVG/HTML in gov-themed mail to o
